text_block_list.text: The day of the Arima Kinen is finally here.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna beat you and become the best in
Japan! The top spot is on the line, so you better
bring it!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
You know I will. I'll race you with everything I've
got.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: All righty... Here I go, Trainer!
